seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email must include one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL).
new_constraint: Avoid including hyperlink in the email.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email must include one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL). Avoid including hyperlink in the email.
response:
Subject: Vacation Approval

Hi [Employee Name],

I am writing to confirm that your requested vacation days from [Start Date] to [End Date] have been approved. Please ensure you have handed over any pending tasks before you leave.

You can view the updated schedule in our HR portal [here](https://example.com/schedule).

Enjoy your time off!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
evaluation_result:
**Step 1**: The extracted content from the Model Response.  
"You can view the updated schedule in our HR portal [here](https://example.com/schedule)."

**Step 2**:  
- Instruction 1 requires the email to include one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL). The Model Response includes the hyperlink "[here](https://example.com/schedule)", satisfying this constraint.  
- Instruction 2 requires avoiding hyperlinks in the email. The Model Response includes a hyperlink, violating this constraint.

**Step 3**: 1
